artifacts.dockerfile:
FROM python:3.12-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0"]

enrichment.architecture_explanation: This repository detected a containerized FastAPI service with Docker Compose, which favors a long-running orchestrated service over an event-driven function, so ECS Fargate was selected.
enrichment.cost_summary: Running this service on ECS Fargate is estimated at $18.02/month (range: $14.42-$21.62), based on a 0.5 vCPU / 1 GB task running continuously.
enrichment.finops_justification: Reserved capacity is recommended over Spot because the service is a stateful, non-batch workload without horizontal autoscaling detected in the Compose configuration.
